posts.text: Episode 14 is out. Maya Chen on why the podcast production pipeline is the product — and how small teams stop making small mistakes that stack up. Raw vs clean transcript, five pre-publish checks, and why automation accelerates drafts but humans own approvals.

If your podcast workflow runs on memory and heroics, it's time to systematize. Start with a standard episode folder, one owned publish checklist, and a raw/clean transcript split. Full release checklist: https://creators.example.com/checklists/podcast-release
